Class Customer

java.lang.Object
CustomerRelationshipManagement.Customer
All Implemented Interfaces:
DetailsDisplayable
public class Customer extends Object implements DetailsDisplayable
This is the customer class that holds all information about the customer And it implements the DetailsDisplayable interface from the common package that has the DetailsDisplayable interface

  • Constructor Details

    • Customer

      public Customer(String customerID, String name, String email, String PhoneNumber, String address, String TypeOfCustomer)
      Customer Constructor that holds parameters
      Parameters:
      customerID - holds the unique ID for the Customer
      name - Stores the customers name
      email - Stores the Customers email
      PhoneNumber - Holds the Customers Phone number
      address - Holds the Customers address
      TypeOfCustomer - Holds the type of customer (normal, VIP, Business)

    • Customer

      public Customer(String customerID, String name, String email, String PhoneNumber, String address)
      Overloaded constructor that defaults TypeOfCustomer to Unspecified
      Parameters:
      customerID - holds the unique ID for the Customer
      name - Stores the customers name
      email - Stores the Customers email
      PhoneNumber - Holds the Customers Phone number
      address - Holds the Customers address TypeOfCustomer String is set to Unspecified
